name: MOURNER

abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.text: This model cannot be the target of actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Eyes in the Mist
abilities.text: When this model activates, an ally within 8" gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

abilities.name: Funeral Procession
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card to declare the Walk action.

triggers.name: Gang Up
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage for each other ally the target is engaged with, to a maximum of +2.

triggers.name: Strip Defenses
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: Bowled Over
triggers.text: Move the target 4" away, then move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Inconsolable Cries
actions.effects: The target gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Mourn the Dead
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with all Remains markers in range, then remove all Remains markers in range.

triggers.name: Strength from Sorrow
triggers.text: For each Remains marker removed this way, a different ally in range may heal 2.

triggers.name: Widow's Wails
triggers.text: Remove a token from an ally in range.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 2, parsed from 'Minion (2)' characteristic
